nodes.label: Legacy local HS256 token helper.     New Atlas auth paths should use Gate-issued
Create a short-lived JWT for password reset.
Decode a reset token and return the user_id. Raises HTTPException on failure.
Attach the JWT as an HttpOnly cookie on the outgoing response.      Security pro
Expire (clear) the HttpOnly auth cookie on the outgoing response.      Passes th
Extract the JWT from the HttpOnly session cookie, if present.
Extract the JWT from the Authorization: Bearer <token> header, if present.
Resolve the currently authenticated user from the incoming request.      Token r
